INDICATION:  ___ year old man with IVC filter.  // Please evaluate IVC filter
position.

TECHNIQUE:  Portable supine abdominal radiograph

COMPARISON:  PET-CT dated ___

FINDINGS: 

There are no abnormally dilated loops of large or small bowel.
The IVC filter projects over the right side of the L2 and L3 vertebral bodies.
Osseous structures are unremarkable apart from a right hip hemiarthroplasty.

EXAMINATION:  MR HEAD W AND W/O CONTRAST T9112 MR HEAD.

INDICATION:  History of metastatic sarcoma with PE and head CT demonstrating
small right cerebellar lesion.  Evaluate for metastatic disease.
